summary: Implemented laptop thermal optimization: removed cpuFreqGovernor conflict with PPD, disabled GNOME tracker services, configured LEAN_NUM_THREADS=8 for compilation, and updated earlyoom to prefer killing lean/lake processes. Build verified successful; manual switch required.

artifacts.summary: Removed cpuFreqGovernor, disabled tracker services, updated earlyoom prefer pattern
Added LEAN_NUM_THREADS=8 for controlled compilation parallelism
Implementation summary with baseline data, changes, and manual steps

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented laptop thermal optimization by removing cpuFreqGovernor conflict with power-profiles-daemon, disabling GNOME tracker services, configuring LEAN_NUM_THREADS=8, and adding lean/lake to earlyoom prefer pattern. Manual nixos-rebuild switch required to activate.

metadata.notes: Phases 6-7 marked PARTIAL because sudo nixos-rebuild switch cannot be run in agent environment

next_steps: Run 'sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .' to activate changes, then verify with diagnostic commands in implementation summary
